content: story-size-classification: _classify_story_size(prompt, brain=None) returns R/M/L; R signals include 'add field','rename','config change','bump version'; L signals include 'new subsystem','redesign','migration','architecture'; L takes precedence over R; default is M

story-size-step-skipping: _SKIP_STEPS_FOR_SIZE={'R':{'verify_plan','red_gate'},'M':set(),'L':set()}; new_story_size computed at review_previous_notes transition, stored in state['story_size']; skip loop advances next_index past skipped steps before GATE/AGENT path check; state persisted via updates['story_size']
